raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX a purchase was made to XXXX in the amount of {$920.00}. I did not make this purchase and nobody else had access to my credit card. 

I disputed the charge and they refunded the charge during the very short investigation and then put the charge back. Barclays credit card said the information they received indicated I made the purchase. 

I then called XXXX to let them know I did not make that purchase. They said they would investigate. Never heard back from them. 

I called Barclays again yesterday to follow up and they said XXXX confirms the purchase was made by me. 

I believe someone hacked into my XXXX account and made the purchase under my name with the card I had previously used in XXXX of XXXX.
